title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 140.710 - To be embodied in list with state and county taxes
text:
140.710.  To be embodied in list with state and county taxes. — The tax and special assessments on the property contained in the delinquent list of such city or incorporated town shall be added to the same property, if the same property is contained in the delinquent list for state and county tax, in a separate column in such list.
(RSMo 1939 § 11204) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9972; 1919 § 12962; 1909 § 11514
